vision_profile.current_state: You are starting your journey in software development with a strong ambition to become a Senior Backend Engineer, currently possessing foundational programming knowledge.
vision_profile.main_blocker: The biggest obstacle is translating theoretical knowledge into practical, scalable, and robust backend system design and implementation.
vision_profile.top_motivation: You are driven by the desire to build high-performance, reliable, and impactful backend systems that power modern applications, especially those integrating AI.

milestones.label: M01
milestones.o: You can write clean, efficient Python code, understand core data structures, and solve algorithmic problems.
milestones.identity_statement: You are laying the bedrock of your engineering career, building the essential programming muscles that will support all future complex systems.

science.desc: You've inherited a Python script with unexpected output. Identify and fix the logical error using debugging tools.
Explain the difference between an array and a linked list, and when you would use each.

modules.title: Data Wrangling
lessons: Working with different data formats (CSV, JSON)
Introduction to SQL for data retrieval

milestones.label: M02
milestones.o: You can design and implement basic APIs, apply OOP principles, and interact with databases.
milestones.identity_statement: You are transitioning from a programmer to a backend developer, understanding how to structure code and build services.

modules.title: OOP & SOLID Principles
lessons: SOLID principles (SRP, OCP, LSP, ISP, DIP)

science.desc: You need to design a logging system. Apply the Single Responsibility Principle to separate concerns.
Describe the core principles of RESTful API design and provide an example of a well-designed REST endpoint.

milestones.label: M03
milestones.o: You can build robust, concurrent backend services, apply design patterns, and handle network communication effectively.
milestones.identity_statement: You are becoming a proficient backend engineer, capable of building reliable and well-structured applications.

science.desc: You need to create multiple instances of an object with complex construction. Implement the Builder pattern.
Explain the difference between concurrency and parallelism, and provide examples of when to use each in backend development.

milestones.label: M04
milestones.o: You can identify performance bottlenecks, implement caching strategies, and design scalable distributed systems.
milestones.identity_statement: You are mastering the art of building performant and scalable systems, preparing to tackle larger architectural challenges.

scenario.title: Designing a Cache for a High-Traffic API

science.desc: A critical API endpoint is experiencing high latency. Analyze the system to identify the bottleneck and propose a caching solution.
Discuss the trade-offs between vertical and horizontal scaling for a web application, and when you would choose one over the other.

scenario.title: Ensuring Data Consistency in a Cluster

milestones.label: M05
milestones.o: You can design and deploy microservices architectures, manage cloud infrastructure, and ensure system reliability.
milestones.identity_statement: You are stepping into the realm of modern, cloud-native backend development, orchestrating complex systems with confidence.

scenario.title: Defining Bounded Contexts for an E-commerce System
Designing an Order Processing Event Flow

science.desc: You are tasked with migrating a monolithic e-commerce platform to a microservices architecture. Outline the key steps and challenges.

scenario.title: Setting up a Basic CI/CD Workflow

science.desc: Explain the benefits of containerization and orchestration in modern backend development.

scenario.title: Defining SLOs for a Critical Service

milestones.label: M06
milestones.o: You can analyze complex system design problems, integrate AI models into backend services, and implement MLOps practices.
milestones.identity_statement: You are integrating cutting-edge AI capabilities into robust backend systems, becoming a versatile and highly sought-after engineer.

scenario.title: Applying CQRS to a Financial System

science.desc: Design a system for a large-scale online gaming platform, focusing on real-time updates and high concurrency.

scenario.title: Setting up Alerts for Data Drift

science.desc: An ML model in production is showing degraded performance. Diagnose the issue and propose an MLOps solution for continuous improvement.

scenario.title: Optimizing an Inference Service for Latency

milestones.label: M07
milestones.o: You are ready to lead complex backend projects, mentor junior engineers, and drive architectural decisions for AI-powered applications.
milestones.identity_statement: You are emerging as a leader, ready to shape the future of backend engineering and mentor the next generation of innovators.

scenario.title: Guiding a Junior Engineer on a Complex Task
Managing Scope Creep in a Project

science.desc: Lead a discussion on designing a highly available and scalable distributed database system from scratch.

scenario.title: Designing a Low-Latency ML Inference Service
Setting up an A/B Test for a Recommendation Engine

science.desc: You need to deploy a new, experimental ML model to production without impacting existing users. Design a strategy for safe rollout and A/B testing.
